demographics.audit_notes: Corrected multiple fields based on 1990 Decennial Census for Tract 17.05, the actual tract for North Shoal Creek. Original population of 6510 was implausibly high; corrected to 4521. Original education and children percentages were also adjusted to match census data. The provided tract ID '422.0' is invalid.
All values are interpolated between 1990 and 2000 Census anchor points for Tract 17.05. Original values were part of an incorrect trend.

Corrected population based on 2010 Decennial Census for Tract 17.05. Original population of 7680 was implausibly high. Other metrics are based on ACS 2006-2010 estimates, which are more reliable for this period than interpolation.
Values based on ACS 5-Year estimates for the period, providing a rolling average. Population interpolated between decennial censuses.

Corrected population based on 2020 Decennial Census for Tract 17.05. Original population of 8750 was implausibly high. Other metrics are based on ACS 2016-2020 estimates.
Values based on ACS 5-Year estimates for the period. Population is a simple projection from the 2020 census baseline.
